headline: Abu Dhabi's Mubadala Capital brings tokenized private fund to Solana

headline: Analyst cuts Coinbase price target 40% ahead of Q2 earnings
summary: On July 23, Citi lowered its target to $235 from $400, a roughly 41% reduction, while reiterating its Buy rating. The move follows a similar downgrade from JPMorgan on July 17, which cut its target to $196 from $283 while keeping an Overweight rating. Coinbase is scheduled to report Q2 ...
